text.arabic: ((بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ [اللَّهُمَّ مِنْكَ وَلَكَ] اللَّهُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ مِنِّي)).
text.arabicTranslated: (Bismil-lah wallahu akbar, allahumma minka walak, allahumma taqabbal  minnee.)
text.translated: (In the name of Allah, and Allah is the greatest.  O Allah, (it is) from You and belongs to You, O Allah, accept this from me.)

title: What to say when slaughtering or sacrificing an animal
